title: lamium album subsp. crinitum
intro: Lamium album subsp. crinitum, also known as white deadnettle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its white flowers and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Lamium album subsp. crinitum lie in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it useful in treating various health issues. This plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lamium album subsp. crinitum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
